overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in Western attire walking through a historic Victorian town at night. The character moves from a paved street lined with iron-fenced mansions, through a garden area with flowering trees, onto a wooden deck with outdoor seating, and approaches a lit gazebo.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with Victorian mansions

events.description: character steps off paved sidewalk onto grassy garden lawn

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past historic townhouses with lit windows and iron fences

entered.detail: two-story historic building with wraparound porch and lit windows
decorative black iron fence with stone pillars running along the property line
old-fashioned wooden cart with large spoked wheels parked by the fence
paved stone walkway running parallel to the street
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved street lined with Victorian mansions featuring wrought iron fences and warm gas lighting. The wooden wagon and stone sidewalk dominate the foreground as the character moves steadily forward, passing the historic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden lawn approaching outdoor dining deck

events.description: ground surface changes from paved sidewalk to grass lawn
character ascends stone steps onto wooden deck

agents.ego_description: walking across the grass lawn toward a building with outdoor lighting, passing under large trees

entered.detail: grassy area with scattered flower beds between the street and the building
large spreading tree with Spanish moss hanging from branches
elevated wooden platform with railings visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving from the street onto a grassy garden area, the character walks toward a wooden deck attached to a second building. Large oak trees with Spanish moss frame the path as the character approaches the stone steps leading up to the deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining deck with gazebo and flowering trees

events.description: character steps onto wooden deck surface with outdoor furniture
approaching gazebo reveals people gathered inside

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden deck past dining tables toward a lit gazebo with people inside

notable_agents.action: people standing and conversing inside the gazebo visible through the windows

entered.detail: round metal table with bottles and plates on the surface
octagonal wooden gazebo with glass windows and hanging lanterns
tree with pink blossoms surrounding the deck area

segments.scene_description: On the wooden deck, the character walks past white patio furniture and tables set with bottles and plates. Pink flowering trees frame the scene as the character approaches a lit gazebo where people are gathered inside, visible through the glass windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a formal Victorian street into a lush, private garden ending at a lit social gathering. It begins by tracking a character along a paved sidewalk lined with wrought iron fences and historic mansions illuminated by warm gas lighting. As the character leaves the street, the scene shifts into a grassy garden area where large oak trees draped in Spanish moss frame the path toward a set of stone steps. The camera then ascends onto a wooden deck, passing white patio furniture and tables set with bottles under the canopy of pink flowering trees. Finally, the movement leads toward a glowing gazebo where people are gathered inside, visible through the glass windows.
